appendix_normalization.source_role: hand-normalized online-appendix formula inventory when present

implementation_cross_check.source_role: MMB implementation cross-check only; not paper-side mathematical source

notes: MinerU captured the core tables M-1 through M-9 and the reduced-form VAR equations.
The derivation records the paper-side RW equation, but the implementation uses auxiliary variables and parameters matching the RW-S column; this variant alignment needs human review.
The algebra from price-level/contract-wage notation to the Rep-MMB auxiliary-variable system was not fully re-derived.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
